# cloudfly_backup_schedules (Data Source)

Lists backup schedules for a CloudFly instance.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `instance_id` (String) Instance ID.

### Read-Only

- `schedules` (Attributes List) List of backup schedules. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--schedules))

<a id="nestedatt--schedules"></a>
### Nested Schema for `schedules`

Read-Only:

- `backup_name` (String)
- `backup_type` (String)
- `id` (Number)
- `instance` (String)
- `rotation` (Number)
- `run_at` (String)
